description: You are a Database Administrator tasked with optimizing a bloated SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_bloated.db. Connect to the 'ChinookBloated' database (Login: ga / password123) and export all 'audit_logs' records dated before '2024-01-01' to /home/ga/Documents/exports/audit_archive.csv, including a header row. Delete these archived records from the 'audit_logs' table and perform a VACUUM or optimization operation to physically reclaim disk space and shrink the database file size.
